decision.summary: No position management is needed and no BTC market meets the playbook entry rules.
decision.rationale: Account state and Polymarket both show no current open positions, so there is nothing to close or reduce. The latest Beecthor transcript and 2026-03-27 summary keep the thesis bearish but not one-way: 65k is decisive support, continuation lower toward 62.7k/59k is favored if it fails, yet a tactical rebound toward 68k-70k is still possible. Binance at 66198.3 with a 24h low of 65548.25 confirms weak downside momentum but also shows price still holding above 65k. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest bearish market is the 65k dip, but its Yes probability is only 3.5%, below the required 50%; upside reach Yes markets are also far below 50%, while the high-probability No sides are too aggressively priced and conflict with the rebound risk still present in the thesis.
